roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:TO SET APD 3455 MOTION & SHERIFF'S WARRANT AFFIDAVIT/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/WEAP/RX/X:DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE A CURFEW FROM 5 PM TO 8 AM/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER INFILE,/X:PURSUANT TO AN EMAIL FROM COUNSEL, A NEW PRCS WILL BE CREATED AFTER SENTENCING ON DEFENDANT'S OTHER CASES, NO OTHER INFORMATION WAS GIVEN/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:TO SET APD 3455, TO JOIN 20003661 & BAIL MOTION/DAWT/ARG&SUB/ACM/WS/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP TO ACM/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE ON HOME DETENTION WITH A CURFEW OF 5PM TO 8AM/CONTD:STATUS OF GPS, TO SET APD PRCS 3455 & TRAILING 20003661/DOP/
/CAL: SENTENCE/CH1:CJ 28 D/CTS: 28/4019HALF/CTORD: REMOVAL OF GPS AND ELECTRONIC MONITORING UPON RETURN OF DEVICE AND CHARGER/
/CAL: TO SET APD 3455/CAL:PETITION TO REVOKE POST RELEASE COMMUNITY SUPERVISION PURSUANT TO PC3455/3455ADV/3455ADM/3455REIN/
/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 11/NP/DEF: REFUSED TO COME TO COURT TODAY/SHER/NB/CTORD: PRCS REVOKED/CONTD: ARRAIGNMENT ON APD 3455 PC TO JOIN 20003661/DOPC/
